summary: Backend API testing complete - all 15 tests passed. Contact form, auth, and CRUD operations working correctly.

minor.issue: Resend email fails with 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address' - domain verification required on Resend dashboard for contact@hardtek.ch
minor.priority: LOW - Expected behavior, form still returns 200

action_items: OPTIONAL: Verify hardtek.ch domain on Resend dashboard to enable email delivery to contact@hardtek.ch
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints tested and working. Auth uses httpOnly cookies. Resend email is fire-and-forget (non-blocking). Domain verification needed on Resend for production email delivery.
resend_email_verification: Confirmed: POST /api/contact returns 200 even when Resend fails. Error logged but does not crash form submission. Fire-and-forget pattern working correctly.
